company.name_jp: アイエスシー株式会社

research_notes: Researched for individual executive social profiles (LinkedIn/Twitter). No profiles found via website scraping. Web search API unavailable (MiniMax key missing). Company website successfully accessed on 2026-06-26, found representative: 寺田 浩之. Company provides image processing inspection systems, established 1990 (Heisei 2), 15 employees, capital 10M JPY. Offices in Yokohama and Kawasaki.
